segments.text: But king Solomon loved many strange women, together with the daughter of Pharaoh, women of the Moabites, Ammonites, Edomites, Zidonians, and Hittites
Ye shall not go in to them, neither shall they come in unto you: for surely they will turn away your heart after their gods
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Solomon clave unto these in love
And he had seven hundred wives, princesses, and three hundred concubines: and his wives turned away his heart
And the LORD was angry with Solomon, because his heart was turned from the LORD God of Israel, which had appeared unto him twice
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Forasmuch as this is done of thee, and thou hast not kept my covenant and my statutes, which I have commanded thee, I will surely rend the kingdom from thee, and will give it to thy servant
segments.speaker: The LORD

footnotes: is done with thee: Heb. is with thee

segments.text: And the LORD stirred up an adversary unto Solomon, Hadad the Edomite: he was of the king's seed in Edom
Let me depart, that I may go to mine own country
segments.speaker: Hadad

footnotes: Let me depart: Heb. Send me away

segments.text: And Jeroboam the son of Nebat, an Ephrathite of Zereda, Solomon's servant, whose mother's name was Zeruah, a widow woman, even he lifted up his hand against the king
Take thee ten pieces: for thus saith the LORD, the God of Israel, Behold, I will rend the kingdom out of the hand of Solomon, and will give ten tribes to thee
segments.speaker: Ahijah the Shilonite

segments.text: And the rest of the acts of Solomon, and all that he did, and his wisdom, are they not written in the book of the acts of Solomon?
And Solomon slept with his fathers, and was buried in the city of David his father: and Rehoboam his son reigned in his stead
